## What does this change?

## Type

- [ ] Bug fix
- [ ] Selector fix (Meet HTML changed)
- [ ] Feature
- [ ] Docs / chore

## Checklist

- [ ] `npm test` passes
- [ ] Added/updated tests for the change
- [ ] **No new network requests, analytics, or external dependencies** (privacy is core - see PRIVACY.md)
- [ ] No em dashes added to code or docs (project convention)

## For selector fixes

- Meet UI / browser version tested against:
- Pasted the relevant captions container HTML in the description or a test:
